## 4. Delivery Options (Build vs Partner)
- Section ID: `delivery-options-build-vs-partner`
- Intent: `comparison`
- Layout: `auto`
- Variant: `white`
- Status: `draft`

- Build: higher control, slower time-to-value, heavier talent burden
- Partner: faster deployment, stronger accelerators, some vendor dependency
- Hybrid model balances speed and control in phase 1
